name: enrahitu
description: EnRaHiTu: Encore.ts + rauthy + hiqlite + Turso/libSQL with the Encore runtime vendored (rust core + js runtime via napi-rs, no encore CLI): a self-contained, single-container application core with zero managed-infrastructure dependencies.

scripts.build:runtime: ENCORE_VERSION=v1.57.9 cargo build --release --manifest-path vendor/encore/Cargo.toml -p encore-js-runtime -p encore-tsparser && node packages/toolchain/scripts/link-runtime.mjs
scripts.dev:idp: docker compose -f docker/compose.dev.yml up -d && node scripts/sync-dev-rauthy-secret.mjs
